audit_status.source_base: Greek Hebrews text tradition with Psalm 95 and Genesis Sabbath-rest texture; draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact complete draft reviewed for rest, Today, word piercing, great high priest, throne of grace.

verses.restored: Therefore, while a promise remains of entering his rest, let us fear/revere lest any of you seem to have fallen short.
For indeed we have been good-newsed, just as they also; but the word of hearing did not benefit them, not having been united by trust with those who heard.
For we who trusted enter into the rest, just as he said: As I swore in my anger, They shall not enter my rest, although the works were finished from foundation of world.
For he has spoken somewhere concerning the seventh day thus: And the Divine rested on the seventh day from all his works.
And in this again: They shall not enter my rest.
Since therefore it remains for some to enter it, and those formerly good-newsed did not enter because of disobedience,
again he appoints a certain day, Today, saying in David after so much time, as said before: Today, if you hear his voice, do not harden your hearts.
For if Joshua had given them rest, he would not speak afterward concerning another day.
So then a Sabbath-rest remains for the people of the Divine.
For the one entering his rest also rested from one's works, as the Divine did from his own.
Therefore let us be eager to enter that rest, so that no one may fall by the same pattern of disobedience.

For the word of the Divine is living and active, sharper than every two-edged sword, piercing as far as division of soul/life and spirit, joints and marrow, able to judge thoughts and intentions of heart.
And no creature is hidden before him, but all things are naked and laid bare to the eyes of the One to whom we must give account.
Therefore, having a great high priest who has passed through the heavens, Jesus the Son of the Divine, let us hold fast the confession.
For we do not have a high priest unable to sympathize with our weaknesses, but one tested in all things according to likeness, apart from sin/misalignment.
Therefore let us come with boldness to the throne of grace, so that we may receive mercy and find grace for timely help.

translation_notes: Rest is layered: wilderness, Sabbath, Joshua, David's Today, and ongoing Divine promise.
The word piercing/judging image discerns the heart; it should not be turned into weaponized text use.
High priest sympathy is central: tested with us, able to help.
safety_note: The warning is paired with invitation to mercy and grace for timely help; do not isolate terror from the pastoral endpoint.
